learningObjectives: Name and use twelve hobby and free-time words at Movers A1 level.
Use present continuous (I am playing) to talk about activities happening now.
Use like + -ing (I like swimming) to talk about hobbies and preferences.
Read short conversations and choose the best response.
Listen to short dialogues and understand the main idea.
Write a short message about hobbies and free time (at least 15 words).
Talk about hobbies and weekend plans in short spoken answers.
unit.listeningSkillFocus: Understand Main Idea of Short Dialogues

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Collecting stamps is Minh's favourite hobby.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Sưu tập tem là sở thích yêu thích của Minh.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Linh is drawing a cat after school.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Linh đang vẽ một con mèo sau giờ học.
Linh thích nhảy múa ở trường.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh collects stamps from many countries.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh sưu tập tem từ nhiều quốc gia.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh has a new stamp from Japan.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh có một con tem mới từ Nhật Bản.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh is reading a comic book now.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh đang đọc một cuốn truyện tranh.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh and Linh are going to the cinema on Saturday.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh và Linh sẽ đi rạp chiếu phim vào thứ Bảy.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: There is a concert in the park on Sunday.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Có buổi hòa nhạc ở công viên vào Chủ nhật.
Minh thích bơi lội vào mùa hè.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: They like playing football after school.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Các bạn thích chơi bóng đá sau giờ học.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Reading comics is fun for Minh.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Đọc truyện tranh rất vui với Minh.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh is playing football with his friends.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh đang chơi bóng đá với bạn bè.

grammarReference.structure: Present continuous: I am playing / What are you doing?
grammarReference.explanation: Use am/is/are + verb-ing to talk about what is happening now. I am reading. Linh is drawing. What are you doing? We are playing football.
examples: They are playing football after school.
commonMistakes: I reading a comic (×) → I am reading a comic (✓)
Linh is draw a cat (×) → Linh is drawing a cat (✓)
What you doing? (×) → What are you doing? (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Use like + verb-ing to talk about hobbies and things you enjoy. I like swimming. Linh likes dancing. Do you like reading comics?
commonMistakes: I like swim (×) → I like swimming (✓)
She like dancing (×) → She likes dancing (✓)
I like to swimming (×) → I like swimming (✓) — at Movers use -ing after like

grammarReference.explanation: Present continuous = now (I am reading). Like + -ing = general hobby (I like reading). Minh is reading now, but he likes reading comics every day.
examples: I like drawing pictures of animals.
They like playing football after school.
commonMistakes: I am like swimming (×) → I like swimming / I am swimming (✓)
She is liking dancing (×) → She likes dancing (✓) — like is not usually continuous
I like am reading (×) → I am reading / I like reading (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Hobby Words
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use hobby, drawing, dancing and collect in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Hobby Vocabulary
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Something you enjoy doing in your free time is a _____.
questions.explanation: Hobby (sở thích) — hoạt động bạn thích làm lúc rảnh.

questions.questionText: Linh is making pictures with a pencil. She is _____.
questions.explanation: Drawing (vẽ) — tạo hình bằng bút chì hoặc bút màu.

questions.questionText: Moving your body to music is called _____.
questions.explanation: Dancing (nhảy múa) — di chuyển theo nhạc.

questions.questionText: Minh wants to _____ stamps from many countries.
questions.explanation: Collect (sưu tập) — gom và giữ nhiều thứ cùng loại.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Hobby Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to what it means.

questions.questionText: Match the hobby words.
questions.explanation: Hobby, drawing, dancing, collect — từ về sở thích.

pairs.right: something fun you do in free time
keep many things of the same type

exercises.title: Check: Hobby Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Collecting stamps is Minh's favourite _____.
questions.explanation: Hobby — sưu tập tem là sở thích của Minh.

questions.questionText: Linh likes _____ at school.
questions.explanation: Dancing — Linh thích nhảy múa ở trường.

questions.questionText: Right now Linh is _____ a cat.
questions.explanation: Drawing — Linh đang vẽ con mèo.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Hobby Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct hobby word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Collecting stamps is Minh's [0]. | Linh is [1] a cat. | She likes [2] at school. | Minh wants to [3] more stamps.
questions.explanation: hobby; drawing; dancing; collect — từ bài đọc.

content.template: Collecting stamps is Minh's [0]. Linh is [1] a cat. She likes [2] at school. Minh wants to [3] more stamps.

exercises.title: Review: Hobby Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review from this lesson. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: What is Linh doing now in the text?
questions.explanation: Drawing — Linh đang vẽ con mèo.

choices.distractorNote: Thích nhưng không làm bây giờ

questions.questionText: Which word means 'keep many stamps'?
questions.explanation: Collect — sưu tập tem.

questions.questionText: A fun activity in free time is a _____.
questions.explanation: Hobby — sở thích, thú vui.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Places and Items
lessons.learningObjective: Use stamp, comic, cinema and concert to talk about hobbies and plans.

exercises.title: Learn: Stamps, Comics and Places
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Minh has a new _____ from Japan in his collection.
questions.explanation: Stamp (tem thư) — vật sưu tập của Minh.

questions.questionText: Minh is reading a _____ book now.
questions.explanation: Comic (truyện tranh) — sách có hình và lời thoại.

questions.questionText: On Saturday they are going to the _____.
questions.explanation: Cinema (rạp chiếu phim) — xem phim.

questions.questionText: There is a _____ in the park on Sunday.
questions.explanation: Concert (buổi hòa nhạc) — nghe nhạc ngoài trời.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Places and Items
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match stamps, comics, cinema and concert.
questions.explanation: Stamp, comic, cinema, concert — đồ vật và địa điểm.

pairs.right: a small picture you put on a letter
a book with pictures and speech bubbles
a place where you watch films

exercises.title: Check: Places and Items Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: Minh collects _____ from many countries.
questions.explanation: Stamps — Minh sưu tập tem.

choices.distractorNote: Đọc comic nhưng sưu tập tem

questions.questionText: Where are Minh and Linh going on Saturday?
questions.explanation: The cinema — đi xem phim thứ Bảy.

questions.questionText: Linh likes reading _____, so she wants an adventure film.
questions.explanation: Comics — trong bài nghe Linh thích truyện tranh.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Place Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about places and items.

questions.questionText: Complete: Minh has a new [0] from Japan. | He is reading a [1] book. | On Saturday they go to the [2]. | On Sunday there is a [3] in the park.
questions.explanation: stamp; comic; cinema; concert — kế hoạch cuối tuần.

content.template: Minh has a new [0] from Japan. He is reading a [1] book. On Saturday they go to the [2]. On Sunday there is a [3] in the park.

exercises.title: Review: Places and Items Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. No hints.

questions.questionText: You watch a film at the _____.
questions.explanation: Cinema — rạp chiếu phim.

choices.distractorNote: Công viên có concert nhưng xem phim ở rạp

questions.questionText: Which item is in Minh's stamp collection?
questions.explanation: A stamp from Japan — tem Nhật Bản.

choices.distractorNote: Vé hòa nhạc — khác sưu tập

questions.questionText: A live music show in the park is a _____.
questions.explanation: Concert — buổi hòa nhạc.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Swimming, Playing, Reading and Football
lessons.learningObjective: Use swimming, playing, reading and football in hobby and free-time contexts.

exercises.title: Learn: Activity Words
exercises.instructions: Choose the word that best completes each sentence.

questions.questionText: Minh likes _____ in summer when it is hot.
questions.explanation: Swimming (bơi lội) — hoạt động mùa hè.

questions.questionText: They like _____ football with friends after school.
questions.explanation: Playing (chơi) — chơi bóng đá với bạn.

questions.questionText: Right now Minh is _____ a comic book.
questions.explanation: Reading (đọc) — đang đọc truyện tranh.

questions.questionText: After school they play _____ in the park.
questions.explanation: Football (bóng đá) — môn thể thao phổ biến.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Activity Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match swimming, playing, reading and football.
questions.explanation: Swimming, playing, reading, football — hoạt động rảnh rỗi.

pairs.right: moving in water for fun or sport
doing a game or sport for fun
looking at words in a book
a team sport with a ball and goals

exercises.title: Check: Activity Words Challenge
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Minh is _____ a comic book now.
questions.explanation: Reading — đang đọc truyện tranh.

questions.questionText: They both like _____ football after school.
questions.explanation: Playing — like + playing football.

questions.questionText: Which activity is best in hot summer weather?
questions.explanation: Swimming — bơi khi trời nóng.

choices.distractorNote: Có thể làm nhưng không đặc trưng hè

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Activity Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in with swimming, playing, reading or football.

questions.questionText: Complete: Minh likes [0] in summer. | They like [1] football. | Right now he is [2] a comic. | Mum says they can play [3] outside.
questions.explanation: swimming; playing; reading; football — hoạt động trong unit.

content.template: Minh likes [0] in summer. They like [1] football. Right now he is [2] a comic. Mum says they can play [3] outside.

exercises.title: Review: All Hobby Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best word from the whole unit.

questions.questionText: After they finish drawing, they can play _____ outside.
questions.explanation: Football — mẹ nói chơi bóng ngoài sân.

questions.questionText: _____ comics is fun for Minh every day.
questions.explanation: Reading — đọc truyện tranh.

questions.questionText: Linh likes dancing. Minh likes _____ in summer.
questions.explanation: Swimming — Minh thích bơi mùa hè.

choices.distractorNote: Cũng thích bóng nhưng câu hỏi mùa hè

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Present Continuous
lessons.learningObjective: Use I am / is / are + -ing to talk about activities happening now.

exercises.title: Learn: I Am Playing
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic — am + reading (-ing).

questions.questionText: Linh _____ drawing a cat now.
questions.explanation: Linh is drawing — she → is + -ing.

questions.questionText: What _____ you doing?
questions.explanation: What are you doing? — câu hỏi hiện tại tiếp diễn.

questions.questionText: They _____ playing football after school.
questions.explanation: They are playing — they → are + -ing.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete Present Continuous
exercises.instructions: Fill in am, is, are or the -ing form.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] reading a comic. | Linh [1] drawing. | What [2] you doing? | We [3] playing football.
questions.explanation: am; is; are; are — chia động từ to be.

content.template: I [0] reading a comic. Linh [1] drawing. What [2] you doing? We [3] playing football.

exercises.title: Check: Present Continuous Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is NOT correct?
questions.explanation: Minh is read — sai, phải is reading.

choices.text: Minh is reading a comic now.
Minh is read a comic now.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: What are you doing? Best answer:
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic, Mum — trả lời đúng thì.

choices.text: I am reading a comic, Mum.

questions.questionText: Right now they _____ football outside.
questions.explanation: They are playing — hiện tại tiếp diễn.

exercises.title: Apply: Build Present Continuous Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / am / reading / a / comic / book.
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic book.

questions.questionText: Make: What / are / you / doing?
questions.explanation: What are you doing?

exercises.title: Review: Present Continuous Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Linh says: I _____ drawing a cat.
questions.explanation: I am drawing — trong hội thoại bài đọc.

questions.questionText: Which question is correct?
questions.explanation: What are you doing? — câu hỏi chuẩn.

questions.questionText: Minh and Linh _____ going to the cinema on Saturday.
questions.explanation: They are going — kế hoạch tương lai gần với are going.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Like + -ing
lessons.learningObjective: Use like + verb-ing to talk about hobbies (I like swimming).

exercises.title: Learn: I Like Swimming
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: I like swimming — like + -ing.

questions.questionText: Linh _____ dancing at school.
questions.explanation: Linh likes dancing — she → likes + -ing.

questions.questionText: Do you like _____ comics?
questions.explanation: Do you like reading — like + reading.

questions.questionText: They both like _____ football after school.
questions.explanation: Like playing — playing football.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete Like + -ing
exercises.instructions: Fill in likes or the -ing form.

questions.questionText: Complete: I like [0] in summer. | Linh [1] dancing. | Minh likes [2] stamps. | We like [3] football.
questions.explanation: swimming; likes; collecting; playing — like + -ing.

content.template: I like [0] in summer. Linh [1] dancing. Minh likes [2] stamps. We like [3] football.

exercises.title: Check: Like + -ing Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: Minh likes collecting stamps — like + collecting.

questions.questionText: Linh likes reading comics, so she wants an _____ film.
questions.explanation: Adventure — trong bài nghe; ngữ pháp: likes reading.

questions.questionText: Best answer: Do you like dancing?
questions.explanation: Yes, I like dancing at school — trả lời đúng.

choices.text: Yes, I like dance at school.
Yes, I like dancing at school.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Like + -ing Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / like / swimming / in / summer.
questions.explanation: I like swimming in summer.

questions.questionText: Make: Linh / likes / dancing / at / school.
questions.explanation: Linh likes dancing at school.

exercises.title: Review: Like + -ing Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Minh likes _____ in summer.
questions.explanation: Swimming — like + swimming.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is NOT correct?
questions.explanation: She like dancing — sai, phải She likes.

questions.questionText: They like _____ football with friends.
questions.explanation: Playing — like + playing football.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Mixed Hobby Grammar
lessons.learningObjective: Use present continuous and like + -ing together (doing now vs liking always).

exercises.title: Learn: Now vs Always
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Right now Minh _____ a comic. He _____ reading comics every day.
questions.explanation: Is reading; likes — bây giờ vs sở thích.

questions.questionText: Which pair is correct?
questions.explanation: I am drawing now / I like drawing — đúng cả hai.

choices.text: I am drawing now. I like drawing pictures.
I drawing now. I likes drawing.

questions.questionText: Linh is dancing now, but she _____ dancing at school every week.
questions.explanation: Likes — sở thích dùng like + -ing.

questions.questionText: What are they doing? They _____ football now.
questions.explanation: They are playing — hiện tại tiếp diễn.

choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — câu hỏi bây giờ

exercises.title: Practice: Now and Hobby Gaps
exercises.instructions: Fill in am/is/are or like/likes.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] reading now. | I [1] reading comics. | Linh [2] drawing. | She [3] drawing at home.
questions.explanation: am; like; is; likes — now vs hobby.

content.template: I [0] reading now. I [1] reading comics. Linh [2] drawing. She [3] drawing at home.

exercises.title: Check: Mixed Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Minh is looking at his stamp. He _____ collecting stamps.
questions.explanation: Likes collecting — sở thích, không phải bây giờ.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: I am reading now, but I like reading every day.

choices.text: I am reading now, but I like reading every day.
I am like reading every day now.

questions.questionText: They like playing football. Right now they _____ outside.
questions.explanation: Are playing — đang chơi bây giờ.

choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — cần are playing now

exercises.title: Apply: Build Mixed Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / am / reading / now / but / I / like / reading / comics.
questions.explanation: I am reading now but I like reading comics.

questions.questionText: Make: We / like / playing / football / after / school.
questions.explanation: We like playing football after school.

exercises.title: Review: Hobby Grammar Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Best description of Linh:
questions.explanation: She is drawing now. She likes dancing at school.

choices.text: She likes drawing now is. She is like dancing.
She is drawing now. She likes dancing at school.

questions.questionText: Mum asks what they are doing. Minh says:
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic book — present continuous.

choices.text: I like reading a comic book now am.
I am reading a comic book.

questions.questionText: Collecting stamps is Minh's hobby. He _____ stamps from many countries.
questions.explanation: Collects — thói quen hiện tại (present simple).

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Choose the Best Response
lessons.learningObjective: Read short conversations and choose the best response.

exercises.title: Learn: Read the Conversation
exercises.instructions: Read the passage. Choose the best response.

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: Minh asks: "What are you doing?" Best response from Linh:
questions.explanation: I am drawing a cat — Linh trả lời trong bài.

choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — không trả lời bây giờ

choices.text: We are going to the cinema.

questions.questionText: Mum could ask: "Is collecting stamps your hobby?" Best answer from Minh:
questions.explanation: Yes! Collecting stamps is my favourite hobby.

choices.text: No, I am drawing a cat.
Yes! Collecting stamps is my favourite hobby.
I am going to the concert now.

exercises.title: Practice: More Conversation Responses
exercises.instructions: Read again. Choose the best reply.

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: "Do you like dancing?" Linh would say:
questions.explanation: Yes, I like dancing at school — trong bài đọc.

choices.text: No, I am reading a comic.
Yes, I like dancing at school.

questions.questionText: Minh asks about Saturday. Mum would say:
questions.explanation: We are going to the cinema on Saturday.

choices.text: I am drawing a cat now.
We are going to the cinema on Saturday.

exercises.title: Check: Choose Response Challenge
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Pick the best response.

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: Linh asks: "What is your favourite hobby?" Best answer from Minh:
questions.explanation: Collecting stamps — sở thích yêu thích của Minh.

choices.text: I am reading a comic now.
Collecting stamps is my favourite hobby.
There is a concert on Sunday.

questions.questionText: Mum says there is a concert on Sunday. Best reply:
questions.explanation: Great! I like dancing, so a concert is fun.

choices.text: Great! Linh likes dancing, so a concert will be fun!

questions.questionText: Someone asks: "Are you playing football now?" Best answer:
questions.explanation: No, I am reading a comic. We can play football later.

choices.text: Yes, I am reading a comic.
No, I am reading a comic. We can play football later.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Conversation Gaps
exercises.instructions: Fill in the best response words from the passage.

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: Complete: "What are you doing?" "I am [0] a cat." | "My hobby is [1] stamps." | "On Saturday we go to the [2]."
questions.explanation: drawing; collecting; cinema — hội thoại trong bài.

content.template: "What are you doing?" "I am [0] a cat." "My hobby is [1] stamps." "On Saturday we go to the [2]."

exercises.title: Review: Response Mix
exercises.instructions: Read the passage. Mixed review.

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: Best response to "Do you like playing football?"
questions.explanation: Yes, we like playing football after school.

choices.text: Yes, we like playing football after school.
I am going to the cinema now.

questions.questionText: Minh says: "I am reading a comic." Best follow-up question:
questions.explanation: Do you like reading comics? — hợp chủ đề.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Main Idea of Conversations
lessons.learningObjective: Understand the main idea of short conversations about hobbies.

exercises.title: Learn: What Is the Text About?
exercises.instructions: Read the passage. What is the main idea?

passage.title: Minh's Free Time
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of this text?
questions.explanation: Minh and Linh's hobbies and free-time activities — chủ đề chính.

choices.text: Hobbies and free time after school

questions.questionText: What are Minh and Linh doing right now in the text?
questions.explanation: Reading and drawing — đoạn đầu bài đọc.

choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — không làm bây giờ

exercises.title: Practice: Main Idea Details
exercises.instructions: Read again. Choose the main point of each part.

Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. After school, Minh and his friend Linh do different hobbies.

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

Minh likes swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football with friends after school.

questions.questionText: The middle part is mainly about:
questions.explanation: Minh's stamp hobby and weekend cinema/concert plans.

questions.questionText: The last part is mainly about:
questions.explanation: What Minh and Linh like doing — swimming, dancing, football.

choices.text: What they are doing right now only

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Doing Now vs Liking

Right now Minh is reading a comic book. Linh is drawing pictures of animals. "What are you doing?" Minh asks. "I am drawing a cat," Linh says.

Minh's favourite hobby is collecting stamps. He has stamps from many countries. On Saturday, Minh and Linh are going to the cinema. Mum says, "We can see a concert in the park on Sunday too."

lessons.title: Lesson 1: After School Now
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to an after-school dialogue and understand what is happening now.

exercises.title: Learn: After School at Home
exercises.instructions: Listen to Minh, Linh and Mum. Answer the questions.

script.title: After School at Home

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Hi, children! What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I am reading a comic book, Mum.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I am drawing a cat. Look!

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: That's nice. Is collecting stamps your hobby, Minh?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes! I am looking at my new stamp from Japan.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I like dancing at school, but now I am drawing.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: After you finish, you can play football outside.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Great! We like playing football after school.

script.audioNotes: Warm after-school dialogue with present continuous. Moderate pace. Approx. 50 seconds.

questions.questionText: What is Minh doing?
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic book — Minh nói với mẹ.

questions.questionText: What is Linh doing?
questions.explanation: I am drawing a cat — Linh trả lời.

exercises.title: Practice: More After-School Details
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Cinema and Concert Plans
lessons.learningObjective: Listen for main ideas about cinema and concert weekend plans.

exercises.title: Learn: Weekend Plans
exercises.instructions: Listen to the family talking about the weekend.

script.title: Cinema and Concert Plans
script.setting: Kitchen table, talking about the weekend

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Mum, can we go to the cinema on Saturday?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes, we can. What film do you want to see?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I like reading comics, so I want an adventure film!

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Me too. After the cinema, can we play football?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: On Sunday there is a concert in the park. We can go there too.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Wow! I like dancing, so a concert is perfect.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I like swimming, but the concert sounds fun.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK — cinema on Saturday, concert on Sunday!

script.audioNotes: Weekend plans dialogue about cinema and concert. Approx. 55 seconds.

questions.questionText: Where are they going on Saturday?
questions.explanation: To the cinema — Minh hỏi và mẹ đồng ý.

questions.questionText: What is on Sunday?
questions.explanation: A concert in the park — mẹ nói.

choices.distractorNote: Có thể chơi nhưng kế hoạch chính là concert

exercises.title: Practice: Plan Details
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Focus on details.

lines.text: Mum, can we go to the cinema on Saturday?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes, we can. What film do you want to see?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I like reading comics, so I want an adventure film!

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Me too. After the cinema, can we play football?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: On Sunday there is a concert in the park. We can go there too.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Wow! I like dancing, so a concert is perfect.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I like swimming, but the concert sounds fun.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: OK — cinema on Saturday, concert on Sunday!

script.audioNotes: Weekend plans dialogue about cinema and concert. Approx. 55 seconds.

questions.questionText: Which sentence summarises BOTH dialogues best?
questions.explanation: Hobbies now and fun plans for the weekend.

choices.text: Minh and Linh enjoy hobbies and have cinema and concert plans.

questions.questionText: They like _____ football after school (dialogue 1).
questions.explanation: Playing — We like playing football.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Now
lessons.learningObjective: Use I am + -ing frames to write about activities happening now.

exercises.title: Learn: Now Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about now.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] reading a comic now. | Linh [1] drawing a cat. | What [2] you doing?
questions.explanation: am; is; are — khung viết hiện tại tiếp diễn.

content.template: I [0] reading a comic now. Linh [1] drawing a cat. What [2] you doing?

exercises.title: Practice: Order Now Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / am / reading / a / comic / book / now.
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic book now.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Now
exercises.instructions: Write about what you are doing now. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short message to your friend Linh about what you are doing right now. Use I am + -ing at least once.
prompts: Is your friend doing something different?

modelAnswer.text: Hi Linh, I am reading a comic book now. I am not drawing today. My hobby is collecting stamps. What are you doing?

grammar.criteria: Uses present continuous and/or like + -ing correctly for hobby contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses hobby and free-time words from the unit (drawing, cinema, swimming, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Sentence
exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence for each situation.

questions.questionText: Best message about what you are doing now:
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic — đúng cấu trúc am + -ing.

choices.text: Reading comic I now am Linh hi.
Hi Linh, I am reading a comic book now. What are you doing?

questions.questionText: Best sentence about Linh now:
questions.explanation: Linh is drawing a cat — she → is.

choices.text: Linh is drawing a cat. Look at her picture!

exercises.title: Review: Now Writing Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best way to complete each writing frame.

questions.questionText: Complete: What [0] you doing? | I [1] looking at my stamp. | We [2] not playing football now.
questions.explanation: are; am; are — câu hỏi và trả lời.

content.template: What [0] you doing? I [1] looking at my stamp. We [2] not playing football now.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Write About Hobbies
lessons.learningObjective: Write connected sentences about hobbies using like + -ing.

exercises.title: Learn: Hobby Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences with like + -ing.

questions.questionText: Complete: I like [0] in summer. | Linh likes [1] at school. | We like [2] football.
questions.explanation: swimming; dancing; playing — like + -ing.

content.template: I like [0] in summer. Linh likes [1] at school. We like [2] football.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Hobby Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put words in order to make hobby sentences.

questions.questionText: Make: Minh / likes / collecting / stamps / from / many / countries.
questions.explanation: Minh likes collecting stamps from many countries.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Hobbies
exercises.instructions: Write about your hobbies. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short note about your hobbies. Use like + -ing at least once.
prompts: When do you do your hobbies?

modelAnswer.text: I like swimming in summer and reading comics after school. Linh likes dancing at school. We both like playing football with friends.

grammar.criteria: Uses present continuous and/or like + -ing correctly for hobby contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses hobby and free-time words from the unit (drawing, cinema, swimming, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Best Hobby Message
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short message.

questions.questionText: Best note about hobbies:
questions.explanation: Like + -ing đúng — swimming, dancing, football.

choices.text: Like I swim summer Linh dance.
I like swimming in summer. Linh likes dancing. We like playing football after school.
Swimming like I dancing Linh football play.

exercises.title: Review: Hobby Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the hobby writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: My favourite hobby is [0] stamps. | I like [1] comics. | Linh likes [2] at school.
questions.explanation: collecting; reading; dancing — sở thích.

content.template: My favourite hobby is [0] stamps. I like [1] comics. Linh likes [2] at school.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Write About Weekend Plans
lessons.learningObjective: Write a short message about cinema or concert plans.

exercises.title: Learn: Weekend Plan Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences about weekend plans.

questions.questionText: Complete: On Saturday we go to the [0]. | On Sunday there is a [1] in the park. | Linh likes [2], so it is fun.
questions.explanation: cinema; concert; dancing — kế hoạch cuối tuần.

content.template: On Saturday we go to the [0]. On Sunday there is a [1] in the park. Linh likes [2], so it is fun.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Plan Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the sentence parts in logical order.

questions.questionText: Make: On / Saturday / we / are / going / to / the / cinema.
questions.explanation: On Saturday we are going to the cinema.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Weekend Plans
exercises.instructions: Write about your weekend plans. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short message about going to the cinema or a concert. Mention at least one place from the unit.
prompts: Where are you going at the weekend?
What do you want to do there?

modelAnswer.text: On Saturday Minh and I are going to the cinema. We want to see an adventure film. On Sunday there is a concert in the park. I like dancing, so it will be fun!

grammar.criteria: Uses present continuous and/or like + -ing correctly for hobby contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses hobby and free-time words from the unit (drawing, cinema, swimming, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Plan Paragraph
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short message about weekend plans.

questions.questionText: Best message about weekend plans:
questions.explanation: Cinema + concert + lý do — đủ thông tin.

choices.text: On Saturday Minh and I are going to the cinema. On Sunday there is a concert in the park. Linh likes dancing, so it will be fun!
Cinema Saturday concert park Linh dance fun.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about the cinema trip:
questions.explanation: We want to see an adventure film — rõ ràng.

choices.text: We are going to the cinema on Saturday. We want to see an adventure film.
Going cinema we film adventure Saturday is.

exercises.title: Review: Weekend Plan Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete a short weekend plan frame.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mum says we can go to the [0] on Saturday. | There is a [1] on Sunday. | I like [2] comics before the film.
questions.explanation: cinema; concert; reading — ôn viết kế hoạch.

content.template: Mum says we can go to the [0] on Saturday. There is a [1] on Sunday. I like [2] comics before the film.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Now
lessons.learningObjective: Choose appropriate spoken phrases about activities happening now.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Now
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: What are you doing? Minh says:
questions.explanation: I am reading a comic book, Mum — trả lời tự nhiên.

choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — không trả lời bây giờ

choices.text: I am reading a comic book, Mum.

questions.questionText: Best answer: What is Linh doing?
questions.explanation: She is drawing a cat — present continuous.

choices.text: She is drawing a cat. Look!

exercises.title: Practice: Now Activity Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: Minh asks: What are you doing? Linh says:
questions.explanation: I am drawing a cat — trong bài đọc.

choices.text: We are going to the cinema.

questions.questionText: Mum says: After you finish, you can play outside. Best reply:
questions.explanation: Great! We like playing football — phản hồi tự nhiên.

choices.text: Great! We like playing football after school.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Now
exercises.instructions: Answer the questions about what you are doing now. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about activities happening right now.
content.sceneDescription: Story outline: (1) After school at Minh's home, (2) Minh is reading a comic, (3) Linh is drawing a cat, (4) Mum asks what they are doing.
followUpQuestions: What can you do after you finish?
suggestedAnswers: I am reading a comic book.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Hobby words (drawing, swimming, cinema) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses present continuous and like + -ing in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses hobby and free-time vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Now Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short spoken response.

questions.questionText: Tell Mum what you are doing. You say:
questions.explanation: I am looking at my new stamp — trong bài nghe.

choices.text: I like stamp Japan new looking.
I am looking at my new stamp from Japan.
Looking stamp I Japan am new.

exercises.title: Review: Now Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer.

questions.questionText: Describe what Minh is doing now. Best phrase:
questions.explanation: He is reading a comic book — mô tả bây giờ.

choices.text: He likes reading always now is.
He is reading a comic book right now.

questions.questionText: Ask a friend what they are doing. Best question:
questions.explanation: What are you doing? — câu hỏi chuẩn.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Talk About Hobbies
lessons.learningObjective: Use like + -ing in short spoken answers about hobbies.

exercises.title: Learn: Hobby Phrases
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say about hobbies.

questions.questionText: What is your favourite hobby? Best answer:
questions.explanation: Collecting stamps is my favourite hobby — Minh.

choices.text: I am collecting stamps now always.
Collecting stamps is my favourite hobby.

questions.questionText: Do you like dancing? Linh would say:
questions.explanation: Yes, I like dancing at school.

choices.text: Yes, I am dancing like school.
Yes, I like dancing at school.
Yes, I like dance at school.

exercises.title: Practice: Hobby Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct spoken response.

questions.questionText: Do you like swimming? Best reply from Minh:
questions.explanation: Yes, I like swimming in summer.

choices.text: Yes, I am swimming in summer always.
choices.distractorNote: Sở thích — không bơi bây giờ

choices.text: Yes, I like swimming in summer.
Yes, I like swim in summer.

questions.questionText: Do you like playing football? Best answer:
questions.explanation: Yes, we like playing football after school.

choices.text: Yes, we are playing football like school.
Yes, we like playing football after school.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Hobbies
exercises.instructions: Answer questions about hobbies. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about hobbies and free time.
content.sceneDescription: Hobby chart: Minh collects stamps; Linh likes dancing; both like playing football; Minh likes swimming in summer.
suggestedAnswers: My favourite hobby is collecting stamps.
Yes, I like dancing at school.
He collects stamps from many countries.
Yes, we like playing football after school.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Hobby words (drawing, swimming, cinema) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses present continuous and like + -ing in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses hobby and free-time vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Tell About Hobbies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short spoken description.

questions.questionText: Best short story about Minh and Linh's hobbies:
questions.explanation: Minh collects stamps; Linh likes dancing; both like football.

choices.text: Minh stamps collect Linh dance football play both.
Minh's hobby is collecting stamps. Linh likes dancing at school. They both like playing football.
Hobby Minh stamps dancing Linh school football.

exercises.title: Review: Hobbies Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer.

questions.questionText: Talk about reading. Best sentence:
questions.explanation: I like reading comics — like + reading.

choices.text: I like reading comics after school.
I like read comics after school.

questions.questionText: Ask about a friend's hobby. Best question:
questions.explanation: Do you like collecting stamps? — câu hỏi hợp lý.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Talk About Weekend Plans
lessons.learningObjective: Describe cinema and concert plans in short spoken answers.

exercises.title: Learn: Weekend Plan Phrases
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say about weekend plans.

questions.questionText: Where are you going on Saturday? Best answer:
questions.explanation: We are going to the cinema on Saturday.

choices.text: We like cinema going Saturday are.
We are going to the cinema on Saturday.
Saturday cinema we going to are.

questions.questionText: What is on Sunday? Best answer:
questions.explanation: There is a concert in the park on Sunday.

choices.text: There concert is park Sunday a in.
There is a concert in the park on Sunday.
Sunday park concert there is a.

exercises.title: Practice: Plan Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answers about plans.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: What film do you want to see? Linh says:
questions.explanation: I want an adventure film — thích comic.

choices.text: Adventure film want I comics reading like.
I like reading comics, so I want an adventure film!

questions.questionText: Why is the concert perfect for Linh?
questions.explanation: I like dancing, so a concert is perfect.

choices.text: Dancing like I concert perfect is so.
I like dancing, so a concert is perfect!
I am dancing concert perfect like.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Weekend Plans
exercises.instructions: Talk about cinema and concert plans. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about weekend plans.
content.sceneDescription: Weekend plan: Saturday cinema with Mum, Minh and Linh; Sunday concert in the park; Linh likes dancing so concert is perfect.
followUpQuestions: Where are you going on Saturday?
What are you doing on Sunday?
Does Linh like the concert plan?
What film do you want to see?
suggestedAnswers: We are going to the cinema.
There is a concert in the park.
Mum, Minh and Linh are going.
Yes, she likes dancing, so a concert is perfect.
We want to see an adventure film.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Hobby words (drawing, swimming, cinema) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses present continuous and like + -ing in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses hobby and free-time vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Tell Weekend Plans
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short spoken description.

questions.questionText: Best summary of the weekend plans:
questions.explanation: Cinema Saturday, concert Sunday — thứ tự rõ.

choices.text: Saturday cinema Sunday concert we going park.
On Saturday we are going to the cinema. On Sunday there is a concert in the park.
Cinema Saturday concert Sunday park we is going.

exercises.title: Review: Weekend Plans Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer.

questions.questionText: Ask Mum about the cinema. Best question:
questions.explanation: Can we go to the cinema on Saturday? — như Minh.

choices.text: Mum cinema Saturday go we can?
Mum, can we go to the cinema on Saturday?
Can we cinema go Saturday Mum?

questions.questionText: Mum agrees to both plans. She says:
questions.explanation: OK — cinema on Saturday, concert on Sunday!

choices.text: OK Sunday cinema Saturday concert on on.
OK — cinema on Saturday, concert on Sunday!
Cinema concert OK Saturday Sunday on.
